tags.note: site until recently had a metal gate. during last weeks filming  this had been removed and the rubber brick-cobble mats lain over.  a metal fence and gate was fitted under the building arch a few m to North on flush to north side of arch and ballon
tags.note:2: floated over the topunder blankets to keep out stray light. today I suveyed a string of bollards in place survey date just after 5ish  on the 12 April 2016
